refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the X coordinate of a Point.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Return the X coordinate of the point, or NULL if not available. Input must be a point.

note.para: To get the minimum and maximum X value of geometry coordinates use the functions and .

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT ST_X(ST_GeomFromEWKT('POINT(1 2 3 4)')); st_x ------ 1 (1 row)
SELECT ST_Y(ST_Centroid(ST_GeomFromEWKT('LINESTRING(1 2 3 4, 1 1 1 1)'))); st_y ------ 1.5 (1 row)
